ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the data collection */,
  "air_temp" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hectopascals */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in watts per square meter per day */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific sensor that collected the data */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the type of data */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the data collection method */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag to indicate the quality of the data (e.g., valid, suspect, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental parameter (e.g., Air Temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method (e.g., Sensor-Based) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data collection method */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report creation */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report (e.g., 2023-06-01 to 2023-06-30) */,
  "average_temp" REAL /* Average temperature recorded */,
  "total_rainfall" REAL /* Total rainfall recorded during the reporting period */,
  "average_wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the alert was generated */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high temperature, low humidity) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data used in the visualization */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, pie) */,
  "settings" TEXT /* Visualization settings in JSON format */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
